name: VS Trust
summary: . Summary VS Trust (the Trust) is a Delaware statutory trust formed on October 24, 2019 and is currently organized into separate series (each, a Fund and collectively, the Funds). As of September 30, 2022, the following two series of the Trust have commenced investment operations: -1x Short VIX Futures ETF (SVIX) and 2x Long VIX Futures ETF (UVIX). Each of the Funds listed above issues common units of beneficial interest (Shares), which represent units of fractional undivided beneficial interest...
